title: LCX8 P2-T02 HomeSurface command-center action/source trace
scope: Trace HomeSurface command-center refresh, queue rows, work-area open buttons, probe status mapping, and backendCapabilities route mapping into existing LCX8 rows. No new visible action rows were added.

lazyweb_reference.query: enterprise command center quick actions dashboard
lazyweb_reference.use: Light reference only; local HomeSurface source and browser QA drive classifications.

anchors.description: normalizeStatus maps API result states to loading/unavailable/denied/review/guarded/live
capabilityCount and capabilityStatusMessage drive visible queue/card messages
buildProbeMap merges backendCapabilities with probe results and normalized status
combinePillarResults collapses multiple domain probe results per pillar
HomeSurface refreshToken/useEffect drives Client/Matter/People/Vault probe fetchers
PageHeader refresh, queue rows, audit summary, and work-area quick links render the visible command center actions
backendCapabilities define Client/Matter/People/Vault labels, routes, endpoints, and boundaries consumed by HomeSurface

row_updates.label: 새로고침
row_updates.handler: onClick -> setRefreshToken(value + 1); useEffect fetches Client/Matter/People/Vault probes
row_updates.api_route: GET /master-data/records; GET /api/crm/opportunities; GET /api/intake/requests; GET /api/portal/dashboard; GET /api/portal/rfi; GET /api/matters; GET /api/finance/time-entries; GET /api/finance/invoices; GET /api/finance/ar-aging; GET /api/analytics/dashboards; GET /api/ai/review-queue; GET /api/hrx/employees; GET /api/vault/documents; GET /api/data-room/projections
row_updates.outcome: refresh remains BLOCKED pending API/browser response proof

api_probe_contract.live_ctx_note: HomeSurface forwards ctx to Client/Matter/Vault fetchers; fetchHrxPeopleOverview currently has no ctx argument.

known_gaps_preserved.reason: Refresh requires P3/P4 API response proof before PASS.
PeopleHome denied/review state gap remains outside HomeSurface P2-T02 but is relevant because HomeSurface People overview also lacks ctx forwarding.

next_tuw: P2-T03 Trace Client components and API clients.

browser_qa_summary.console_event_note: API 500/connection errors are expected because HomeSurface browser QA ran only the web server. This verifies UI handler behavior, not API operation.
